milestones.required_evidence: actual Mixtral hotset tensor page is bound to remote/direct-IO replay and sampled without committing checkpoint payloads
milestones.claim_boundary: bounded tensor-page read evidence only; not model forward execution

milestones.required_evidence: sampled BF16 tensor values are finite and q8/q4 tile quant probes are replayable
milestones.claim_boundary: bounded dtype/quant probe evidence only; not expert or block forward parity

milestones.required_evidence: hotset BF16 tile matvec rows match PyTorch CPU reference
milestones.claim_boundary: tile matvec parity only; not expert FFN real execution

milestones.required_evidence: one real Mixtral expert FFN forward matches PyTorch reference with real-model evidence flag
milestones.claim_boundary: contract exists, but current summary has real execution disabled

milestones.required_evidence: one real Mixtral MoE block forward matches PyTorch reference
milestones.claim_boundary: no real MoE block forward parity artifact is present
blocked_by: real expert FFN forward parity is still blocked
MoE block parity rows are missing

milestones.required_evidence: one-token logits match a PyTorch reference for the same checkpoint, tokenizer input, and routing path
milestones.claim_boundary: no one-token logits parity artifact is present
blocked_by: real MoE block forward parity is still blocked

milestones.required_evidence: 16-token decode from the SSD-resident runtime is replayable and compared to reference output
milestones.claim_boundary: decode is blocked until one-token logits parity is accepted
blocked_by: one-token logits parity is still blocked

milestones.required_evidence: cold-cache and warm-cache runs are measured separately with pinned runtime settings
milestones.claim_boundary: cache performance claims are blocked until decode exists

milestones.required_evidence: SSD bytes/token, miss/token, and TPS are recorded for cold and warm runs
milestones.claim_boundary: runtime metric claims are blocked until cold/warm decode measurement exists
blocked_by: cold/warm cache measurement is still blocked
